name: Alaska
why_ruby_pro: Alaska Alcoholic Beverage Control Board licensing compliance built into every workflow
Excise tax calculations under Alaska Statutes Title 04 applied on every transaction
Local option community restrictions tracked automatically across Alaska's dry villages
problem: ABCB reporting assembled by hand from spreadsheets across remote, disconnected accounts
Alaska Title 04 excise tax calculations create compliance risk on every invoice
Local option rules in hundreds of communities make delivery eligibility hard to track
difference: Auto-calculate Alaska excise on beer, wine, and spirits at the line-item level
ABCB compliance reports generated from live transaction data — no manual assembly
Local option community database enforced at order entry so no prohibited deliveries
how_it_works: Every order flagged against ABCB license status and local option community restrictions
One-click ABCB reports pulled directly from actual sales and inventory records
See account health and route profitability across Alaska's remote distribution network
